fato_historico: 1976: Christopher Ewart-Biggs, the British ambassador to the Republic of Ireland, is assassinated by the Provisional IRA.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos suggests you channel your fiery spirit into bridges of peace rather than walls of conflict. As the world recalls the fragility of diplomacy, reflect on how your bold energy may foster understanding. It is a good time to transform intense passions into quiet acts of empathy and bridge-building, softening edges that may have grown sharp lately.
frase_do_dia: True strength is found in the gentle art of mending what is broken.
significado_numero: A powerful number signifying spiritual awakening and inner peace for your journey.
conselho: Consider using your natural leadership to heal misunderstandings with those you hold dear.
